root_cause: CrashLoop began after a recent image update
evidence: A fresh successful image pull was recorded for the container that is now crashlooping
CrashLoopBackOff started after the new image was pulled in the same pod lifecycle
First BackOff event followed the successful pull by 192.0s

causes.message: Kubelet completed a fresh pull of the image now used by the crashing container
The newly pulled image starts and then fails repeatedly at runtime
Pod entered CrashLoopBackOff after the image update

pod:orders-api-6d7d7ff9dc-p4lrk: CrashLoopBackOff began shortly after kubelet pulled a fresh image
container:api: Container restarted 6 times after image 'ghcr.io/example/orders-api:2026.03.27-rc1' was freshly pulled

likely_causes: The new image introduced an application regression that causes immediate startup failure
The updated image changed runtime dependencies, configuration defaults, or bundled assets
The rollout switched to a bad build even though the image pulled successfully
suggested_checks: Inspect logs from the crashing container revision
Compare the new image digest with the previous known-good rollout
Roll back to the previous image and confirm whether the crashloop stops
Review application startup changes introduced by the new image build
